overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city in a video game, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and a mix of futuristic and traditional architecture. The camera follows a character walking along wet pavement, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and approaching a massive intersection with heavy atmospheric haze.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath an overpass, passing pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with large umbrella walking toward camera on the wet pavement

entered.detail: tall metal fence barrier running along the left side of the walkway with horizontal slats
modern building facade with horizontal neon strip lights in yellow and red
traditional Asian-style building with tiered roof and warm yellow neon lighting
rain-soaked concrete sidewalk reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered overpass walkway, with a metal barrier on the left and a traditional pagoda-style building with yellow lights visible across the street on the right. The pavement is wet and reflective. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk toward the camera as it moves forward through this semi-enclosed urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban canyon with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits the covered overpass into the open street revealing massive futuristic skyscrapers ahead
vehicles begin passing by on the multi-lane road to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the open sidewalk, approaching a large intersection with towering buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the wet street, headlights reflecting on the pavement

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisement displaying VOTE with a political figure, red and white colors
massive futuristic skyscraper with geometric patterns and illuminated windows dominating the skyline
tall street lamps with multiple floodlights illuminating the road
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast urban canyon with a massive corporate tower looming ahead. A prominent holographic VOTE billboard floats in the center of the view. The traditional pagoda building recedes into the right background as the camera approaches a crosswalk, with sparse vehicle traffic passing on the right.

events.description: slight turn to the left to follow the curved sidewalk path around the intersection
waiting briefly as vehicles pass before continuing across the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection crosswalk, turning slightly to follow the curved sidewalk while avoiding traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: tall traffic signal posts with red lights visible
orange-tiled pedestrian walkway curving around the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the intersection crosswalk, navigating around street light poles while vehicles pass on the right. The mega corporate tower shifts to the left background as the path curves. The sidewalk transitions to orange paving tiles, and the camera follows the curved path away from the main intersection into a slightly less dense urban area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban corridor into a vast, neon-lit corporate intersection and finally toward a quieter city district. It begins under a covered overpass walkway, moving past a metal barrier and reflective wet pavement while pedestrians with umbrellas approach from the opposite direction. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens into a massive urban canyon dominated by a looming corporate tower and a floating holographic VOTE billboard, while a traditional pagoda building recedes into the background. The camera then navigates through a crosswalk, weaving around street light poles as vehicles pass by on the right. Finally, the path curves away from the main intersection, shifting the corporate tower to the left as the sidewalk transitions to orange paving tiles and leads into a less dense area of the city.
